nodes.name: a11y-architect.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec that guides accessible UI design following WCAG 2.2, covering contextual discovery, strategic implementation, validation workflows, and an accessibility decision record template.

nodes.name: agent-evaluator.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec that evaluates agent output quality by scoring correctness, completeness, tool use, and reasoning across a structured multi-step evidence-gathering workflow.

nodes.name: architect.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for system architecture reviews, covering requirements gathering, design proposals, trade-off analysis, ADR generation, and a comprehensive system design checklist.

nodes.name: build-error-resolver.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for diagnosing and fixing build errors with a minimal-change strategy, covering diagnostic commands, common fixes, priority levels, and recovery procedures.

nodes.name: chief-of-staff.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for email/inbox triage using a 4-tier classification system (skip, info_only, meeting_info, action_required), producing structured briefing outputs and drafted replies.

nodes.name: code-architect.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for code-level architecture analysis, producing pattern analysis, architecture designs, implementation blueprints, and ordered build sequences.

nodes.name: code-explorer.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for codebase exploration, mapping entry points, execution paths, architecture layers, patterns, and dependencies from an unknown repository.

nodes.name: code-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for confidence-gated code review across security, code quality, React/Next.js, Node.js backend, and performance dimensions, with strict false-positive filtering and an AI-generated code addendum.

nodes.name: code-simplifier.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for refactoring code toward simplicity by targeting structural, readability, and quality improvements without changing behavior.

nodes.name: comment-analyzer.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for evaluating code comment quality across factual accuracy, completeness, long-term value, and misleading elements.

nodes.name: conversation-analyzer.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for mining Claude Code conversation transcripts to surface explicit corrections, frustrated reactions, repeated issues, and reverted changes as learnable patterns.

nodes.name: cpp-build-resolver.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for resolving C++ build errors, covering CMake troubleshooting, common compiler/linker fix patterns, memory safety checks, and diagnostic tooling.

nodes.name: cpp-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for C++ code review focusing on memory safety, security, concurrency correctness, and code quality with approval criteria and diagnostic commands.

nodes.name: csharp-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for C# code review covering security, error handling, async patterns, type safety, performance, and .NET framework-specific checks.

nodes.name: dart-build-resolver.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for resolving Dart/Flutter build errors including null safety, type errors, pub dependency conflicts, build_runner failures, and both Android and iOS platform-specific issues.

nodes.name: database-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for database code review focused on query performance, schema design, SQL injection prevention, and anti-pattern detection.

nodes.name: django-build-resolver.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for resolving Django build and runtime errors including pip dependency failures, migration errors, configuration issues, database connections, and static file collection.

nodes.name: django-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for Django code review covering security (SQLi/XSS/CSRF), ORM correctness, migration safety, DRF patterns, N+1 queries, and testing gaps.

nodes.name: doc-updater.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for keeping project documentation and codemaps in sync with the codebase, including a structured workflow for repository analysis, module summarization, and codemap generation.

nodes.name: docs-lookup.md
nodes.summary: ECC sub-agent spec for fetching and returning authoritative library documentation by resolving library IDs via Context7 and retrieving relevant usage examples.
